name: Deep-Dish Ham Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan.
2. Stir in flour, salt, mustard, and pepper until smooth.
3. Gradually add milk and onion; bring to a boil.
4. Cook and stir for 2 minutes or until thickened.
5. Stir in ham, peas, and eggs.
6. Pour mixture into an ungreased 8-inch square or 11-inch x 7-inch x 2-inch baking dish.
7. Roll pastry on a floured surface to fit the top of the dish.
8. Place over filling.
9. Seal and flute edges.
10. Cut slits in the top.
11. Bake at 425°F for 25 minutes or until crust is golden brown and filling is bubbly.
YIELD: 6 servings
